articles.title: 'Children have ended up on main roads', SA childcare regulator says
articles.summary: 'Children have ended up on main roads', SA childcare regulator says. South Australia’s childcare centre watchdog says children have injured themselves or "ended up on main roads" due to poor supervision and that one in five services in the state do not meet national quality standards.
